layout_variants.display_en: Significance

units.translation_target_text: The scope of the audit is affected by our application of materiality aspects. We have established certain quantitative thresholds for materiality that, together with qualitative considerations, help us determine the scope of our audit and the relevant individual financial statement items.
units.translation_en: The scope of the audit is affected by our application of materiality aspects. We have established certain quantitative thresholds for materiality that, together with qualitative considerations, help us determine the scope of our audit and the relevant individual financial statement items.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The scope of the audit is affected by our application of materiality aspects. We have established certain quantitative thresholds for materiality that, together with qualitative considerations, help us determine the scope of our audit and the relevant individual financial statement items.

units.translation_target_text: The nature, timing and extent of our audit procedures on items and disclosures and assist us in assessing the impact of misstatements on the financial statements (taken as a whole) individually and as a whole.
units.translation_en: The nature, timing and extent of our audit procedures on items and disclosures and assist us in assessing the impact of misstatements on the financial statements (taken as a whole) individually and as a whole.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The nature, timing and extent of our audit procedures on items and disclosures and assist us in assessing the impact of misstatements on the financial statements (taken as a whole) individually and as a whole.

units.translation_target_text: We use performance materiality to reduce the likelihood that the sum of uncorrected and undetected misstatements exceeds overall materiality to an appropriately low level. Specifically, we use performance materiality
units.translation_en: We use performance materiality to reduce the likelihood that the sum of uncorrected and undetected misstatements exceeds overall materiality to an appropriately low level. Specifically, we use performance materiality

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: We use performance materiality to reduce the likelihood that the sum of uncorrected and undetected misstatements exceeds overall materiality to an appropriately low level. Specifically, we use performance materiality

units.translation_target_text: Determine the scope of the audit and test the nature and extent of account amounts, types of transactions and disclosures, for example when determining sample size.
units.translation_en: Determine the scope of the audit and test the nature and extent of account amounts, types of transactions and disclosures, for example when determining sample size.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Determine the scope of the audit and test the nature and extent of account amounts, types of transactions and disclosures, for example when determining sample size.

units.translation_target_text: When determining performance materiality, we consider a number of factors, including past misstatements, risk assessment and integration risks, and the effectiveness of controls, and believe that the upper limit of the normal range is appropriate.
units.translation_en: When determining performance materiality, we consider a number of factors, including past misstatements, risk assessment and integration risks, and the effectiveness of controls, and believe that the upper limit of the normal range is appropriate.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: When determining performance materiality, we consider a number of factors, including past misstatements, risk assessment and integration risks, and the effectiveness of controls, and believe that the upper limit of the normal range is appropriate.
